raw_input: 4-month history of persistent fatigue, unexplained weight gain of 6kg, feeling cold even in warm rooms, constipation, and low mood. Hair has become noticeably thin and dry.
6-week history of excessive thirst, passing urine frequently including twice at night, blurred vision, and unintentional weight loss of 5kg. Tingling in both feet and fatigue after meals.

3-month history of fatigue, shortness of breath climbing stairs, palpitations, frequent headaches, and lightheadedness on standing. Heavy prolonged periods lasting 8-9 days for 5 months. Vegan diet for 2 years. Pallor noted on conjunctival exam.
